title: mespilus oxyacantha var. media
intro: Mespilus oxyacantha var. media is a lesser-known variety of the common hawthorn tree, scientifically classified as a deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Mespilus oxyacantha var. media include its rich source of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its potential therapeutic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Mespilus oxyacantha var. media can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
